areas.desc:
You are locked in a cramped cage, filled to the brim with peasants.
The smell is... unpleasant, and you want nothing more than to get out.
It seems any attempt to leave could result in more severe punishment...
You've dropped to a crawl. The other peasants are unbothered, and nobody saw.

When you picked up the key, a peasant noticed!
Quickly; what do you do?

With so much overcrowding; infighting began shortly after you drew the first blow.
The guards had to open the cage; and now's your chance!
You slipped out undetected, and there's little chance they'll recognize you with how many peasants are around.

You put the key into the hole... twisted... and the guards instantly started yelling.
They took your key, and now you're potentially going to be sentenced even harsher...

It's over. They sentenced you to death, and now there's nothing left for you to do.
The Zenith will remain in the Heavenrend mountains, and your legacy will soon be forgotten.
Goodbye, lowly peasant.
